examples.title: Deploying a Smart Contract on a Blockchain
examples.description: This pseudocode demonstrates the process of deploying a smart contract on a blockchain.
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the process of deploying a smart contract on a blockchain, including compiling the contract code, deploying the bytecode, and instantiating the contract.

examples.title: Deploying a Smart Contract on Ethereum using Solidity
examples.description: This example demonstrates the process of deploying a smart contract on Ethereum using Solidity.
examples.explanation: This example demonstrates the process of deploying a smart contract on Ethereum using Solidity, including defining the contract code and deploying the contract.
